message:
feat(inference): add hidden semi-Markov model feature extractor (nao.13)

Implement Plan §2(F)/§4.5 HSMM for regime-based process state estimation:

- HsmmState enum: Useful, UsefulBad, Abandoned, Zombie classification states
- GammaDuration: Gamma(α, β) duration priors with hazard rate computation
- HsmmConfig: Configurable duration priors, transition matrix, emission model
- HsmmAnalyzer: Forward inference with duration-dependent transitions
- HsmmResult: State sequence, duration stats, switch detection, stability score
- HsmmEvidence: Integration with ledger/decision core (log BF for triage)
- BatchHsmmAnalyzer: Process multiple sequences efficiently

Key features:
- Explicit duration modeling via Gamma distributions (not geometric HMM)
- Deterministic outputs for fixed inputs (reproducible)
- State switch detection with confidence scores
- "is_stuck" detection for terminal states
- Hazard rate computation at current dwell time

Includes 27 unit tests covering:
- Gamma duration math (mean, variance, survival, hazard)
- Config validation (transition matrix, initial probs)
- State detection (useful, abandoned, zombie)
- Switch detection and duration statistics
- Evidence generation and determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
